>_ Fixbot
Features Install GitHub
v4.0 is now live

Autonomous Support Engineer for Windows

Fixbot diagnoses your system, fixes locked files, optimizes storage, and resolves issues in real time. This installer sets up Fixbot and creates an Admin shortcut on the desktop.

Install Fixbot
Tip: If your browser blocks launching a .cmd file, run this from an elevated CMD: installer\install.cmd

What gets installed

Admin Launcher

Creates a desktop shortcut that always opens Fixbot as Administrator.

Fixbot Command

Adds a fixbot command to PATH for admin CMD use.

Program Files Install

Copies the Fixbot folder into Program Files\Fixbot.

Local Reports

Stores Fixbot reports and memory inside the install folder.

After install

1

Open Fixbot (Admin)

Use the desktop shortcut: Fixbot (Admin).

2

Use Admin CMD

In any elevated CMD, run: fixbot or start fixbot.

3

Run a scan

Type scan to get a full system report.

Fixbot installer UI • Windows 10/11
